entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A grain legume crop studied for resistance to the spotted pod borer.

entities.name: MARUCA VITRATA
entities.description: The spotted pod borer, a destructive pest that attacks reproductive parts of grain legumes.

entities.name: TRICHOME LENGTH
entities.description: A morphological trait of leaves and pods associated with resistance to M. vitrata.

entities.name: TRICHOME DENSITY
entities.description: A morphological trait of leaves and pods associated with resistance to M. vitrata.

entities.name: SUGARS
entities.description: A biochemical trait whose high content in flowers and pods is associated with susceptibility to M. vitrata.

entities.name: PROTEINS
entities.description: A biochemical trait whose high content in pods is associated with susceptibility to M. vitrata.

entities.name: PHENOLS
entities.description: A biochemical trait whose high concentration in flowers and pods is associated with resistance to M. vitrata.

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pigeonpea genotypes to withstand or reduce the impact of M. vitrata.

entities.name: SUSCEPTIBILITY
entities.description: The vulnerability of pigeonpea genotypes to damage by M. vitrata.

entities.name: ICPL 98003
entities.description: A short-duration pigeonpea genotype categorized as highly resistant to M. vitrata.

entities.name: ICPL 98008
entities.description: A short-duration pigeonpea genotype categorized as highly resistant to M. vitrata.

entities.name: ICPL 88034
entities.description: A short-duration pigeonpea genotype categorized as susceptible to M. vitrata.

entities.name: ICPL 98012
entities.description: A short-duration pigeonpea genotype categorized as moderately resistant to M. vitrata.

entities.name: ANTIBIOSIS
entities.description: A concept referring to the adverse effect of a host plant on the biology of the pest, such as reduced larval and pupal weights.

entities.name: PATANCHERU, INDIA
entities.description: The location of the International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics where the study was conducted.

entities.name: POD DAMAGE
entities.description: The percentage of pod destruction caused by M. vitrata in the field.

entities.name: LARVAL WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of M. vitrata larvae, which is reduced when reared on resistant genotypes.

entities.name: PUPAL WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of M. vitrata pupae, which is reduced when reared on resistant genotypes.

relationships.description: has high concentration in flowers and pods
has high content in flowers and pods
exhibits antibiosis effects on the pest
exhibits antibiosis effects on the pest
shows reduced weight on resistant genotypes
